code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test08-SEP-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia and a low HbA1c, suggesting possible recurrent low blood glucose. Elevated creatinine indicates impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, suggesting possible renal tubular dysfunction or early diabetic nephropathy, despite low HbA1c. Further clinical correlation and nephrology evaluation are recommended.
